entry.note: <L>7785<pc>1-0585<k1>Akalpa<k2>Akalpa {#Akalpa#}¦ (von {#kalp#} mit {#A#}) <lex>m.</lex> <div n="1"> 1) {%Anwendung, Anfügung%} ({#kalpana#}) <ls>TRIK. 3,3,274.</ls> <ls>H. an. 3,440.</ls> <ls>MED. p. 15.</ls> <div n="1">— 2) {%Schmuck, Putz, Zierath%} <ls>AK. 2,6,3,1.</ls> <ls>TRIK.</ls> <ls>H. 635.</ls> <ls>an. 3,439.</ls> <ls>MED.</ls> {#AkalpaparicaryA#} <ls>MBH. 3,13373.</ls> {#˚sADana#} <ls>RAGH. 17,22.</ls> <ls n="RAGH.">18,51.</ls> <ls>SĀH. D. 54,12.</ls> <ls n="SĀH. D. 54,">17.</ls> <div n="1">— 3) {%Krankheit, Unwohlsein%} <ls>VIKR. (LENZ) 93,16.</ls> Falsche Lesart für {#Akalya#} . <LEND>
<L>13372<pc>1-158-b<k1>Akalpa<k2>Akalpa˚<h>2 <hom>2.</hom> {#Akalpa˚#}¦ <lex>Adv.</lex> = {#Akalpam, ˚sTAyin#} {%bis zum Ende der Welt dauernd%} <ls>KĀD. II,46,19</ls>. <LEND>
